translations.description: Federalism, Nationalism and Development (Routledge, 2008) translated into Punjabi, due for publication.
Book chapter 'The rise and fall of the welfare state in the UK' translated into Russian and published in an academic journal.
Book chapter 'Political Economy of Centralisation in India' translated into Punjabi and published in a Punjabi academic journal.
Article 'Dialectics of Human Rights' translated into French and published in THE FRONT (magazine of Paris Universites).

panels_chaired: Has chaired/convened 35 panels at national and international conferences in Brazil, China, Czech Republic, Hong Kong, India, Ireland, Mexico, Pakistan, Russia, South Korea, UK, and USA.
